さっきのお客様、またあなたを指名したいって言ってたわよ。: That customer from earlier said he wanted to request you again.
へ～、気に入ってもらえたのかな？<br>それなら良かったぁ～……: Hmm... I wonder if he liked me? That's good then...
でも、あのお客様ね？<br>前にプレイが乱暴だってクレームが入ったことあったんだ:
But about that customer, there was a complaint before that he was
rough during his sessions. Were you alright?
あぁ～……そうなのかぁ～！<br>正直、ちょっと乱暴なお客さんだったなぁ……: Ahh... is that so! Honestly, he was a bit rough...
あらら、そうだったのね。<br>イオラさんなら、いざとなったら対処できるかな～っ:
Oh my, is that right? I figured you'd be able to handle it if it came to
that, Iola.
そんなぁ～、酷いですよ～。<br>あたしには殴るのを禁止してたくせに～！:
That's so mean! Even though you told me I wasn't allowed to hit
anyone!
さすがにお客様に怪我を負わせるわけにはいかないでしょ？<br>でも、そんな乱暴に:
I can't exactly let you injure a customer, can I? But you handled that
rough treatment well, didn't you?
え～と、ま、まぁ……そうですね。<br>ちゃんと鍛えてありますから！: Umm, w-well, I guess... I've been properly trained!
（まぁ、いっか。アレはアレで、あたしも興奮しちゃったし……）: (Pff, whatever. That thing got me super hot too...)
おっ、イオラじゃないか。<br>え～と、今日が初出勤だったよな？ 確か……: Oh, it's Iola. Umm, today was your first shift, right? I'm pretty sure...
先生！ そうだよ！ 今、終わったところ！<br>ひょっとしてあたしのことが心配で:
Teacher! That's right! I just finished! Did you come to check on me
because you were worried?
いや……ルディアに用事があっただけだ。<br>でも、その明るい感じだと、うまく仕:
Nah... I just had something to talk to Ludia about. But from how
cheerful you are, it looks like you're doing fine.
ん～……こなせてる……のかなぁ？<br>ねぇ、先生～、もう１回だけ、研修お願いで:
Hmm... I wonder if I'm really handling it? Hey, Teacher, could I ask for
just one more training session?
そう！ だってよく分からないところがあるんだもん～！<br>補習ってことで、あと:
Yeah! I mean, I still don't get some of it! So think of it as a remedial
lesson, just one more time... okay? Please!
いやいや、研修の補習なんて聞いたことないぞ？: No no, I've never heard of 'remedial lessons' for training before!
ふふふ。そう言わずに、してあげたら？ 補習。<br>こんなに勉強熱心な生徒さんな:
Fufufu. Don't say that. Why not give her a "remedial lesson"? She's
such an eager student. What's wrong with that?
なんでルディアまで……<br>ったく……なんで、こうなるんだか……:
Why are you taking her side, Ludia... Geez... how do I always end up in
these situations...
（先生にも、してほしいんだよね～。<br>さっきみたいに、強引に犯されてる感じの:
(I want Teacher to do it to me too. Like earlier, when I was being
forcibly taken!♡)
イオラは小悪魔の様な微笑みを浮かべて可愛くおねだりしてくる。<br>その笑顔に釣:
Iola flashed a little devil smile and made a cute request. Caught by
that smile, he finally accepted her 'remedial lessons'...
